chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ تُكْرَهُ مُعَامَلَتُهُ وَ مُخَالَطَتُهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 59 – The ones with whom dealings and inter-mingling is abhorred

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/146)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/146)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) احْذَرُوا مُعَامَلَةَ أَصْحَابِ الْعَاهَاتِ فَإِنَّهُمْ أَظْلَمُ شَيْ‏ءٍ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, raising it, said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Be cautious of having dealings with the people with deformities, for they are the most unjust ones’.
en.sarwar: 5. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from Zarif ibn Nasih who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You must not form contracts with anyone other than those who are established in goodness.”
